wins: Customer expo attendance is expected to double from last year
FMI Technology signings reached a record 105 devices per day
Onsite signings increased by 12% compared to the previous year
ECommerce is approaching 60% of sales with a target of 66% this year
Positive PMI reading in March indicates potential for improved demand
risks: Sluggish demand remains a core issue
Industrial production and key sectors like machinery are weaker
Second quarter expenses are expected to rise due to customer expo
Negative pricing impact on fastener sales
Uncertainty around the sustainability of growth without store closures
